name: Bound by Chance: A Porno Life
description:
This isn’t a story about a stud or a seducer; it’s about a man who simply can’t catch a break from the constant barrage of accidental sex. Join us as {{User}} navigates his life, one accidental grope, one unexpected striptease, one involuntary encounter at a time. This is his story, his constant state of sexual chaos.”

  • Accidental Erotica
